finding_title: `<html>` element does not have a `[lang]` attribute
finding_description: If a page doesn't specify a `lang` attribute, a screen reader assumes that the page is in the default language that the user chose when setting up the screen reader. finding_title: Tables do not use `<caption>` instead of cells with the `[colspan]` attribute to indicate a caption.
